name: Tapanuli Orangutan
conservationEfforts: Discovered as a separate species in 2017. Conservation groups oppose the Batang Toru hydroelectric dam that would fragment remaining habitat.
description: The most recently described great ape species, known from only about 800 individuals in the Batang Toru forest of North Sumatra. They have distinctive cinnamon-colored fur and smaller skull than other orangutans.
